rows.label: fev01_100_155_msg0002
rows.name:
I've got preparations to make,
but I should let Gramps know
what's happening first.

rows.label: fev01_100_155_msg0003
rows.name:
If I left on another ship without
asking and stayed away for a
while, he'd yell at me later!

rows.label: fev01_100_155_msg0004
rows.name:
I should head down the
stairs and make my way back
to Goldmund Return Port.
